title: linaria munbyana subsp. pygmaea
intro: Linaria munbyana subsp. pygmaea, also known as Dwarf Toadflax, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an antispasmodic, which helps to relieve muscle spasms and cramps. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Linaria munbyana subsp. pygmaea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, from menstrual cramps to respiratory issues.
